x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Lender
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that has accepted under specific requirements to provide a monetary or securities loan to a borrower. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Borrower
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that has applied, met specific requirements, and received a monetary or securities loan from a lender. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Syndicate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A syndicate is a temporary alliance formed by professionals to handle a large transaction that would be impossible to execute individually. https://www.investopedia.com/terms/s/syndicate.asp

A syndicate is a self-organizing group of individuals, companies, corporations or entities formed to transact some specific business, to pursue or promote a shared interest.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syndicate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Co-Borrower
x-enumeration-literals.description: A person or entity that shares responsibility for repaying the loan together with the main borrower.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description: A person or organization that agrees to repay the loan if the borrower defaults.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity that provides assets as security for the loan, which may be the borrower or a third party.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee lending activities to ensure compliance, fairness, and financial stability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Supplier
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization that sells goods to the borrower, often indirectly linked because the loan finances these purchases.
